articles.title: A 'delicate' balance for Canada and a 'win-win' for Modi as Carney visits India - BBC
articles.description: The two countries are repairing a strained relationship as they also seek to reduce their trade reliance on the US.
articles.content: The latest derailment in trade talks occurred after former Prime Minister Justin Trudeau made a bombshell public accusation against India in 2023, alleging it was involved in the killing of Hardeep S… [+156 chars]
